revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:氷室神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]


'''Himuro Shrine'''（氷室神社) can refer to the following shrines dedicated to [[Himuro Gongen]] and [[Tsuge no Ōyamanushi|Tsuge no Oyamanushi]].

The word Himuro literally means {{ill|Ice_house_(building)|en|Ice_house_(building)|qid=Q253893|lt=Ice house|1=Ice house (building)}}

== Himuro Shrines across Japan ==
* {{ill|Himuro Gongen|ja|氷室権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himuro Gongen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 氷室}}

* {{ill|Shusō|ja|主水司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shusō|1=Main Water Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11368771}}

* {{ill|Hatahisa Shrine|ja|幡日佐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatahisa Shrine|qq=}}

* {{ill|Himuro Shrine|en|Himuro Shrine|qid=Q11549570|lt=Himuro Shrine|1=Himuro Shrine}}
* {{ill|Himuro Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|氷室神社 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himuro Shrine (Kyoto)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 氷室 (京都市北区西賀茂)|1=Himuro Shrine (Kyoto)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11549558}}
* {{ill|Himuro Shrine (Tenri)|ja|氷室神社 (天理市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himuro Shrine (Tenri)|1=Himuro Shrine, Tenri city|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q58209684}}
* {{ill|Himuro Shrine (Kobe)|ja|氷室神社 (神戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himuro Shrine (Kobe)|1=Himuro Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11549572}}
{{disambiguation}}
